[2018-03-29 05:26] .bky_1556 (bky): What would the feral kill if you click it?
[2018-03-29 05:27] .bky_1556 (bky): What does your opponent kill if they breach for 1?
[2018-03-29 05:27] .bky_1556 (bky): If the answer in both cases is "drone" you hold the feral.
[2018-03-29 05:32] Deleted User (Deleted User): drone/drone equivalent/engineer equivalent/1 soak equivalent
1 hp feral
[2018-03-29 05:36] .bky_1556 (bky): Hmm, one other variable.
[2018-03-29 05:36] .bky_1556 (bky): Is this a one-time burst that your opponent will never be able to replicate? That is, will you be able to defend the cynestra next turn if it survives this turn?
[2018-03-29 05:39] .bky_1556 (bky): If not, then you attack with the feral.
[2018-03-29 05:42] xyotsuba: is it possible that antima into arka is good ?
[2018-03-29 05:49] Deleted User (Deleted User): possibly? but if it's a antima worth a damn ur likely killing cool shit
[2018-03-29 05:53] xyotsuba: well the idea would be to go for a small 7 dmg antima
[2018-03-29 05:54] xyotsuba: then u have arka and 7 engineers really early into the game and your opponent cant do shit about it because they cant counter arka till they have 7 attack
[2018-03-29 05:54] xyotsuba: at which point u just hit with arka till they arka
[2018-03-29 05:55] xyotsuba: and they still have to defend the antima. if they dont u obviously dont arka
[2018-03-29 05:56] Deleted User (Deleted User): u just blew ur antima and also ur arka buy for no reason imo
[2018-03-29 05:57] .bky_1556 (bky): It would leave you severely over-defended.
[2018-03-29 05:57] xyotsuba: if they defend with a doomed mech maybe its worth u still deny some good absorb and u can get tons of attack really fast
[2018-03-29 05:58] xyotsuba: arka is 4 attack same as thunderhed
[2018-03-29 05:58] mrguy888: They need to have some serious frontline stuff to want to Antima into Arka
[2018-03-29 05:58] mrguy888: a 7 engi antima sucks
[2018-03-29 05:58] mrguy888: but a 15 engi one that kills 2 shredders and buys arka might be good
[2018-03-29 05:59] xyotsuba: interesting that would definitely be really strong
[2018-03-29 06:01] .bky_1556 (bky): By the time you can pull off antima for 7 into Arka they're probably a couple turns away from their own Arka at most.
[2018-03-29 06:01] .bky_1556 (bky): Then your Arka has to deal with their absorb barrier for a turn.
[2018-03-29 06:01] .bky_1556 (bky): Then when you overcome that, they Arka back.
[2018-03-29 06:01] .bky_1556 (bky): Then they block with their Arka while they Antima you.

[2018-03-29 15:27] gertm: Are games usually over that quickly?
[2018-03-29 15:29] p0lari (Polari): this specific set is defined by matrix and ampo
[2018-03-29 15:30] p0lari (Polari): matrix is one of the best defensive units in game and will shut down any attempt at a rush, and given that you're going high econ, ampo will trump anything else
[2018-03-29 15:31] p0lari (Polari): usually you wouldn't be able to ramp up your damage as quickly as that
[2018-03-29 15:32] p0lari (Polari): but in that set if one player just gets out ampo uncontested it just ends the game

[2018-03-29 18:03] .bky_1556 (bky): I'm considering a reddit article on common uses of Rhinos. Any suggestions?
[2018-03-29 18:05] drevoed: sometimes I go Rhino instead of Wall for soak, just to threaten 1 more damage.
[2018-03-29 18:06] .bky_1556 (bky): The gambit rhino, yes.
[2018-03-29 18:09] drevoed: Rhino or Shiver Yeti is always a hard choice for me. Probably something to dig into.
[2018-03-29 18:09] .bky_1556 (bky): I'm also planning to cover rhinos as a first absorber to let multicolor openings go red first (bridge rhinos)
[2018-03-29 18:10] .bky_1556 (bky): anti-frontline rhinos
[2018-03-29 18:10] .bky_1556 (bky): soak rhinos (briefly)
[2018-03-29 18:11] .bky_1556 (bky): and rhinos timed to run out of stamina when you'd need to start buying soak rhinos anyway (peak rhinos)
[2018-03-29 18:12] .bky_1556 (bky): also, rhinos vs. inefficient threat (option rhinos)

[2018-03-29 18:39] .bky_1556 (bky): You aren't using your third engineer very well.
[2018-03-29 18:40] .bky_1556 (bky): Could be +3 without the splitter mistake, which is about where you want to be.
[2018-03-29 18:41] .bky_1556 (bky): the splitter does get a little value back from baiting your opponent into holding a drone.
[2018-03-29 18:41] .bky_1556 (bky): Still not worth it tho.
[2018-03-29 18:41] p0lari (Polari): ok but seriously do you want to get zemora or apollo in this set? I have no idea
[2018-03-29 18:41] .bky_1556 (bky): You could have just had an extra drone-income.
[2018-03-29 18:42] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): also i dont think apollo is that good in this set
[2018-03-29 18:42] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): almost everything in the random set has 4+ health
[2018-03-29 18:43] p0lari (Polari): I guess you can't get zemora because you want to get the arka option up?
[2018-03-29 18:43] masn6811 (Masne98888): looks like mrguy and i have a very different opinion on rhino
[2018-03-29 18:43] p0lari (Polari): well my thinking regarding apollo is that you can sell the third forge to drakes and it's just good value if it's easy-ish to get
[2018-03-29 18:44] p0lari (Polari): even if random set is mostly >3 hp there's no defence so you can always snipe walls
[2018-03-29 18:44] p0lari (Polari): and it will ban cynestra
[2018-03-29 18:44] .bky_1556 (bky): Here the Apollo will always have an okay role sniping blastforges to remove Drake threat.
[2018-03-29 18:45] darkeisbein: so what's the deal with rhino?
[2018-03-29 18:45] darkeisbein: I usually don't hold rhino in high regards
[2018-03-29 18:45] .bky_1556 (bky): Rhinos are bad unless you find some clever way to get more value out of them.
[2018-03-29 18:45] darkeisbein: I guess rhino is nice for gambits
[2018-03-29 18:45] .bky_1556 (bky): But there are lots of clever ways.
[2018-03-29 18:46] mrguy888: Rhino is the punishment to balance Tarsiers and Cynestra and stuff
[2018-03-29 18:46] .bky_1556 (bky): and sometimes you use them because the alternatives are worse.
[2018-03-29 18:46] mrguy888: Don't needlessly punish yourself
[2018-03-29 18:46] p0lari (Polari): it's kind of crap at anything it does but sometimes you just really need a specific thing and it's your least bad option
[2018-03-29 18:47] masn6811 (Masne98888): My rhino guide: Block goose with rhino. Absorb on rhino. Soak with rhino. Cycle rhinos. Gambit with rhinos. Embrace the rhino. :Rhino:
[2018-03-29 18:47] drevoed: I use rhino very often, got me from zero to master in 2 weeks. Don't have the intention of stopping using them.
[2018-03-29 18:47] darkeisbein: I guess rhino is what happens when you decide to do a red blocker that is worse then other red blockers?
[2018-03-29 18:47] masn6811 (Masne98888): block splitter with rhino if you dont have tarsiers in construction
[2018-03-29 18:47] masn6811 (Masne98888): ignore the haters. rhino is great.
[2018-03-29 18:48] masn6811 (Masne98888): opponent going big red? SMOrc em down. :Rhino:
[2018-03-29 18:48] namington: I know you're joking but
[2018-03-29 18:49] namington: In what situation is "gambit with Rhino"
[2018-03-29 18:49] .bky_1556 (bky): The biggest use cases for "gambit with rhino" are:
[2018-03-29 18:49] p0lari (Polari): goddammit I tried playing that set totally not fbi was asking about vs master bot and just straight up forgot about arka
[2018-03-29 18:49] masn6811 (Masne98888): your opponent is absorbing on omega, and so are you
[2018-03-29 18:49] p0lari (Polari): I guess I've had enough to drink for tonight
[2018-03-29 18:50] .bky_1556 (bky): 1) against very inefficient threat
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): you buy two of your defense with rhino
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): then they wont click omega
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): so rhino just saved you 2 defense that turn
[2018-03-29 18:50] .bky_1556 (bky): or (2) when your opponent has very valuable rearmost defender.
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): (even better with feral, but you don't always have feral)
[2018-03-29 18:50] darkeisbein: yeah that's what I meant
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): you also use it to defend against frostbites
[2018-03-29 18:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): (ossi is even better for this)
[2018-03-29 18:50] .bky_1556 (bky): Frostbite falls in the "inefficient threat" category.
[2018-03-29 18:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): and against 2 drakes, generally correct response is 1 :Forcefield: + 1 :Rhino:
[2018-03-29 18:51] .bky_1556 (bky): If they spend 2 bites to make you block on rhino instead of wall, that's a fine trade for you.
[2018-03-29 18:51] .bky_1556 (bky): If the bite a rhino, they wasted a freeze and it's ok
[2018-03-29 18:51] darkeisbein: or just let the rhino die
[2018-03-29 18:51] .bky_1556 (bky): If they don't bite, you get to click the rhino.

[2018-03-30 10:00] gertm: I think I could have won earlier, but not sure. If anyone has time and wants to coach a noob a little: iIHFt-Nc6gh
[2018-03-30 10:10] p0lari (Polari): just looking at the set, drake and omega look tempting but maybe you can't get to them against bite and vore
[2018-03-30 10:11] p0lari (Polari): looking at the game, the bot opens with 2.da which is the expected p2 opening, and ddb is a fine response
[2018-03-30 10:11] p0lari (Polari): then it gets weird because the bot just isn't doing anything
[2018-03-30 10:12] p0lari (Polari): I don't like your turn 5, chill isn't very impressive when you have no damage up, steelsplitter isn't a great unit and here it isn't even immediately doing anything as it's taking you from 1 to 2 damage against a wall
[2018-03-30 10:13] p0lari (Polari): turn 9 you throw away three frostbites for literally nothing
[2018-03-30 10:14] p0lari (Polari): on that turn you also had an option to sacrifice a bite for two damage by chilling the drone and denying absorb
[2018-03-30 10:15] p0lari (Polari): on turns 9 and 10 you buy second and third blastforges without using them for anything before turn 14
[2018-03-30 10:16] p0lari (Polari): at this point you were miles ahead and it shouldn't have even been a game
[2018-03-30 10:16] p0lari (Polari): like you could mash ttw every turn and easily coast to victory
[2018-03-30 10:18] p0lari (Polari): turn 11 you again spend three frostbites to force the bot to lose an engi and a rhino instead of wall, doing no extra damage
[2018-03-30 10:19] p0lari (Polari): no that's turn 12, on turn 11 you just didn't click your attackers for no apparent reason?
[2018-03-30 10:19] p0lari (Polari): turn 13 another pair of frostbites thrown away for no benefit

[2018-03-30 10:22] gertm: So I misplayed countless times but still won, do I need to switch to a more difficult bot?
[2018-03-30 10:23] gertm: Since mistakes aren't being punished.

[2018-03-30 10:26] p0lari (Polari): or on the blastforge turns you could have looked at your next turn's gold and thought about what you're going to spend it on, and probably immediately realised you won't be spending two blue

[2018-03-30 10:28] p0lari (Polari): and you get some variety in their level and style of play, and get some cosmetic rewards

[2018-03-31 06:36] amalloy: in an ebb turbine set, is it often good for p1 to open  DD/DB/D1? this ends with the same amount of income as DD/DD/DDB, with one less gold in the bank but instead of two drones you have a turbine, so you can push harder when it's time to sell drones
[2018-03-31 06:41] mrguy888: that one gold is worth more than the blue
[2018-03-31 06:42] amalloy: it's not the blue that you net. both lines have the same amount of blue available turns 4+
[2018-03-31 06:43] amalloy: the advantage is you are better at selling drones
[2018-03-31 06:44] mrguy888: 2 ebbs isn't what you typically want.
[2018-03-31 06:44] amalloy: interesting. why not?
[2018-03-31 06:45] mrguy888: If you click 2 you need more tech to spend the gold and stop being able to spend it faster.
[2018-03-31 06:45] mrguy888: So you lose a lot from floating resources.
[2018-03-31 06:45] mrguy888: With only 1 ebb you can pretty happily click it every turn.
[2018-03-31 06:46] mrguy888: With 2 you end up only wanting to click 1 per turn.
[2018-03-31 06:46] amalloy: hm, that makes sense
[2018-03-31 06:48] xyotsuba: when is it right to start clicking?
[2018-03-31 06:48] mrguy888: They way I think of it is that if you really need to spend that blue on something on exactly turn 4 you need to dd db to get that blue cause skipping ebb is usually game losing
[2018-03-31 06:49] amalloy: ah, i see what you meant now about having access to the blue
[2018-03-31 06:49] mrguy888: You can click ebb every turn no exceptions. If you end up buying a drone on the same turn you can just unclick the ebb instead.
[2018-03-31 06:50] mrguy888: That way you can use your "do i want a drone here?" decision that you have to use every game.
[2018-03-31 06:51] amalloy: 2 ebbs felt good in qoLE7-rXB@F, but (a) i'm sure master bot didn't really play the most testing line, and (b) i ended up only actually double-clicking ebb once, on a turn i wouldn't have had to if i'd had extra gold
[2018-03-31 06:52] mrguy888: Plasmafier is a better second ebb than second ebb
[2018-03-31 06:52] amalloy: so it sounds like you are quite right
[2018-03-31 06:53] mrguy888: Synth and Redeemer are one duo than makes you wanna dd db ebb
[2018-03-31 06:53] mrguy888: so you can synthdd next turn
